compatibilityWindowStartedBy: 460bf65 Flip SPA, openapi, and docs to /api/v1/ as the canonical path
removalCriteria: At least one production deploy cycle has completed since the SPA started using /api/v1 routes.
Application Insights shows effectively zero production traffic to unprefixed /api routes over the last 7 days.
api/openapi.yaml lists only canonical /api/v1 public routes.
